arguments.argument: if bCanBeHitBack=1 and hitByPlayer=0 { var tEfCir; tEfCir=instance_create(x,y,oEfCircleBlast) tEfCir.image_alpha=0.75; tEfCir.myRad=8; tEfCir.radScl=2; tEfCir.fadeSpeed=0.08 bulletSpeed+=spdInc hitBackNum+=1 hitByPlayer=1 playSound(global.snd_HitOrb,0,1,22000+(hitBackNum*2000)) direction=point_direction(x,y,oHexor_Main_R2.x,oHexor_Main_R2.y) }
